Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Martin Wilson. Maintainer, author.

  • Yong Wang. Contributor.

  • John Muschelli. Contributor.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Wilson, M., spant: An R package for magnetic resonance spectroscopy analysis. JOSS 2021, 6(67), 3646.

@Article{,
  title = {spant: An R package for magnetic resonance spectroscopy analysis},
  author = {Martin Wilson},
  journal = {Journal of Open Source Software},
  publisher = {The Open Journal},
  year = {2021},
  volume = {6},
  number = {67},
  pages = {3646},
  doi = {10.21105/joss.03646},
}

Martin Wilson, Adaptive baseline fitting for 1H MR spectroscopy analysis, MRM 2021 85(1):13-29.

@Article{,
  title = {Adaptive baseline fitting for 1H MR spectroscopy analysis},
  author = {Martin Wilson},
  journal = {Magn Reson Med},
  year = {2021},
  volume = {85},
  number = {1},
  pages = {13--29},
  doi = {10.1002/mrm.28385},
}

Martin Wilson, Chemical shift and relaxation regularization improve the accuracy of 1H MR spectroscopy analysis, MRM 2025 93(6):2287-2296.

@Article{,
  title = {Chemical shift and relaxation regularization improve the accuracy
              of {1H} {MR} spectroscopy analysis},
  author = {Martin Wilson},
  journal = {Magn Reson Med},
  year = {2025},
  volume = {93},
  number = {6},
  pages = {2287--2296},
  doi = {10.1002/mrm.30462},
}

Martin Wilson, Robust retrospective frequency and phase correction for single-voxel MR spectroscopy, MRM 2019 81(5):2878-2886.

@Article{,
  title = {Robust retrospective frequency and phase correction for single-voxel MR spectroscopy},
  author = {Martin Wilson},
  journal = {Journal},
  year = {2019},
  volume = {81},
  number = {5},
  pages = {2978-2886},
  doi = {10.1002/mrm.27605},
}
